narrative:
Broadview Heights-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 992 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.1 percentage points.
